data.body: Filed doc-tracking ticket f5df-0069-6339-4973 (reusable-machinery API reference: signing surface, LLM workflow runtime, prompt/contract model, output-schema seam) per user instruction; linked discovered_from epic 5fd2. Reusable machinery IS partially documented (llm-framework.md, event-schema.md, workflow-authoring-v2.md) but lacks a single developer API reference for the reuse surface. Will also document as I go.
